tasks.description: Complete Sections 1-6 of architect.md replacing template boilerplate with the actual AI-OS System Philosophy and Technical Strategy.
tasks.summary: Replaced template boilerplate in Sections 1-6 with actual AI-OS philosophy, Triad Architecture, interaction flows, technical strategy, and MCP nervous system details.

tasks.description: Execute Section 34 (Architectural Fragmentation) by creating .ai/blueprints/mcp.md and mapping out all existing MCP tools.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/mcp.md and accurately mapped all 16 MCP servers by core capabilities, security, and Git operations.

tasks.description: Create .ai/blueprints/agents.md and map the structures for Claude and Gemini agents and skills.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/agents.md mapping all Claude, Gemini, and Shared skills and agents across the ecosystem.

tasks.description: Blueprint the monorepo structure (npm workspaces) to unify MCP server dependencies and resolve fragmentation.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/workspace.md to define npm workspaces and deduplicate MCP dependencies.

tasks.description: Define the execution constraints and CI testing strategy for the Bootloader fallback layer to guarantee SQLite state validity.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/bootloader.md to define execution constraints and CI tests for the fallback mechanism.

tasks.description: Update README.md — Add all registered MCP servers from .mcp.json (e.g., filesystem, memory, orchestrator-mcp, etc.) to the MCP Nervous System section to resolve documentation drift.
tasks.summary: Converted to E-4 (Architect forbidden from writing README.md).

tasks.description: Update CONTRIBUTING.md — Create the file and add development setup, skill/agent authoring guidelines (YAML frontmatter), git workflow, and ensure no ghost tools are referenced to resolve documentation drift.
tasks.summary: Converted to E-5 (Architect forbidden from writing CONTRIBUTING.md).

tasks.description: Update agents.md blueprint to explicitly state that Gemini YAML schema does not require `disable-model-invocation`, `user-invocable`, or `allowed-tools`.
tasks.summary: Added YAML schema note to agents.md clarifying Gemini frontmatter exemptions.

tasks.description: Blueprint the integration of 'Adaptive Thinking' (e.g., `think: \"max\"` or 'Deep Think') for the Architect phase to enhance planning depth, while maintaining standard execution speed for the Engineer.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/capabilities.md to define Adaptive Thinking injection points for Gemini and Claude.

tasks.description: Blueprint the replacement/augmentation of Playwright-based `vibe-check-mcp` with native OS-level 'Computer Use' capabilities (e.g., Project Mariner/Claude Computer Use) for advanced visual UI QA.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/capabilities.md to map out the computer-use-mcp integration for advanced visual UI QA via TestSprite.

tasks.description: Blueprint an **Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Bridge** (`advisor-mcp`) to enable the Advisor/Executor pattern. This will allow the Engineer (Claude) to synchronously query the Architect (Gemini) for mid-execution clarifications without dropping the session.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/interop.md defining the A2A Bridge and advisor-mcp server for dynamic Architect queries.

tasks.description: Blueprint a **Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Gate** (`approval-mcp`) to formalize execution pauses and user CLI prompts for high-risk Tier 3 operations.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/interop.md defining the HITL approval-mcp server to pause high-risk execution loops.

tasks.description: Blueprint the integration of Explicit Context Caching (Prompt Caching) to permanently cache core `.ai/blueprints/` and SQLite schemas at the API layer, reducing token costs and JIT latency for repetitive agent turns.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/caching.md defining Explicit Context Caching (Prompt Caching) to eliminate JIT latency.

tasks.description: Blueprint the migration of Triad communication (e.g., `TASKS.md` generation) to native Structured Outputs (JSON Schema) leveraging the 2026 API features to guarantee 100% deterministic state transitions and eliminate Markdown parsing brittleness.
tasks.summary: Created .ai/blueprints/structured-outputs.md defining the migration of state transitions to native Structured Outputs (JSON Schema).

tasks.description: AUDIT-STRATEGIC: structured-outputs.md §3 promises bin/ai enforces JSON Schema at API-call level via response_schema/tool_choice — but bin/ai is a bash wrapper with no LLM integration. Either mark §3 as Phase 2 or design the API integration layer.
Implement the monorepo workspace structure (npm/pnpm workspaces) across `src/mcp/*` per `.ai/blueprints/workspace.md`.
tasks.summary: Added root package.json with npm workspaces pointing to src/mcp/*. Hoists @modelcontextprotocol/sdk to a single shared install. npm test wired to bash tests/run.sh.

tasks.description: Implement the Bootloader fallback CI validation strategy and resilience tests per `.ai/blueprints/bootloader.md`.
tasks.summary: Extended resilience_test.sh with 6 new scenarios (T-RES-12–17): simulated node failure, Python/shell fallback verification, and PRAGMA integrity_check on state.sqlite. Suite grows from 11 to 17 tests. All 413 tests pass.

tasks.description: Fix verification-mcp bug where Claude-specific YAML fields are erroneously enforced on Gemini agents. Conditionalize the check based on the file path (`/gemini/` vs `/claude/`).
tasks.summary: Conditionalized verification-mcp required fields by path: Gemini skills (/gemini/) only require name+description; Claude/shared require all 5. Added T-05.08–11 tests. Suite 12→22 tests, 423/423 pass.

tasks.description: Update README.md — Add all registered MCP servers from .mcp.json (e.g., filesystem, memory, orchestrator-mcp, etc.) to the MCP Nervous System section to resolve documentation drift.
tasks.summary: Updated README.md MCP Nervous System section with all 19 registered servers grouped by category (State, Code, Safety, Intelligence, Quality). Updated test badge to 423/423.

tasks.description: Create CONTRIBUTING.md — Add development setup, skill/agent authoring guidelines (YAML frontmatter), git workflow, and ensure no ghost tools are referenced to resolve documentation drift.
tasks.summary: Created CONTRIBUTING.md with dev setup, project structure, Claude/Gemini skill frontmatter schemas, Ghost Tool rules, MCP server skeleton, git workflow, and test authoring guide.

tasks.description: Run the AI-OS installer/sync script (e.g. `install-ai-os.sh`) to deploy the recent `src/mcp/` bug fixes to the global `~/.ai-os/` directory, resolving the active verification-mcp warnings.
tasks.summary: Ran install-ai-os.sh to sync src/mcp/ fixes to ~/.ai-os/. All 16 MCP servers reinstalled, .mcp.json regenerated with absolute paths, Gemini frontmatter sanitized.

tasks.description: Update `.gemini/settings.json` and `.claude/settings.json` (or their respective API configuration wrappers) to inject the 'Adaptive Thinking' (`think: \"max\"`) parameter during the Architect phase per `.ai/blueprints/capabilities.md`.
tasks.summary: Added thinking_effort: "high" to .gemini/settings.json (Architect phase) and CLAUDE_THINKING_BUDGET_TOKENS: "0" to .claude/settings.json env (Engineer phase stays at standard speed) per capabilities.md blueprint.

tasks.description: Implement `computer-use-mcp` per `.ai/blueprints/capabilities.md` to augment TestSprite visual QA using native OS-level 'Computer Use' capabilities in a sandboxed headless environment.
tasks.summary: Implemented computer-use-mcp: 7 tools (capture_screen, left_click, right_click, double_click, type_text, key_press, health_check). Security: DISPLAY=:99 hardcoded, HOME=/tmp/computer-use-sandbox, keyboard sanitized, screenshots deleted immediately, startup exits on missing Xvfb. Registered in registry.json (D-002) and .mcp.json. CAPABILITIES.md updated. 34 new tests. Tier 3 critics: ARCH_PASS SEC_PASS TESTS_PASS.

tasks.description: Implement the `advisor-mcp` server as defined in `.ai/blueprints/interop.md` to provide Claude with an Agent-to-Agent (A2A) RPC bridge to query a headless Gemini instance mid-execution.
tasks.summary: Implemented advisor-mcp A2A bridge: ask_architect tool invokes gemini -p with architect.md context pre-loaded, optional domain blueprint, [A2A_RULING] logged to LOG.md, graceful degradation when Gemini unavailable. Registered in registry.json and .mcp.json. 34 tests, 493/493 suite.

tasks.description: Implement the `approval-mcp` server as defined in `.ai/blueprints/interop.md` to enforce Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) CLI prompts for Tier 3 security operations flagged by safe-exec or trigger-audit.
tasks.summary: Implemented approval-mcp HITL gate: request_approval tool with Y/N terminal prompt, ANSI sanitization (T-HITL-001), hardcoded SQLite path ~/.ai-os/approvals.sqlite (T-HITL-002), stdin.isTTY assertion (T-HITL-003), SQLite write before MCP response (T-HITL-004), maxLength 200/500 with rejection (T-HITL-005). 37 tests, 531/531 suite. Tier 3: ARCH_PASS SEC_PASS TESTS_PASS.

tasks.description: Implement API-level Explicit Context Caching per `.ai/blueprints/caching.md` by extending `token-budget-mcp` or creating a dedicated cache-manager. Ensure `.ai/blueprints/` and SQLite schemas are permanently cached.
tasks.summary: Implemented cache-manager-mcp: 4 tools (build_cache, get_cached_context, invalidate_cache, get_cache_status). Assembles architect.md + blueprints/*.md + state.sqlite schema + registry.json into a prompt-cacheable System Context blob. mtime-based invalidation, SQLite persistence at ~/.ai-os/cache.sqlite, path traversal protection, no execSync. 61 tests, 593/593 suite. D-004 written. Blueprint: caching.md.

tasks.description: Migrate Triad state communication to native Structured Outputs (JSON Schema) per `.ai/blueprints/structured-outputs.md`. Deprecate manual markdown editing for `TASKS.md` and `REVIEWS.md`, replacing it entirely with `task-synchronizer-mcp` schema validations.
tasks.summary: Implemented Structured Outputs: src/shared/schemas/state.json (4 schemas), src/shared/schema-validator.js (lightweight Draft-07 validator, no new deps), task-synchronizer-mcp extended with validate_payload tool and _assertSchema runtime guards on add_task/update_task_status/add_stamp/set_project_focus. TASKS.md and REVIEWS.md remain generated views. 51 tests, 644/644 suite. Blueprint: structured-outputs.md.

tasks.description: **Fix Missing Tool Wires**: The newly built MCP servers (`advisor-mcp`, `approval-mcp`, and `computer-use-mcp`) are registered but absent from all agent/skill YAML frontmatters. Update the `allowed-tools` arrays in `src/claude/agents/` and `src/claude/skills/` to explicitly grant access (e.g., `vibe_sentinel` needs `computer-use-mcp`, all core Claude agents need `advisor-mcp`, etc.) so they can actually be invoked.
tasks.summary: Updated allowed-tools in 5 agent YAMLs (vibe_sentinel, chaos_monkey, security_engineer, devops_engineer, critic_arch) to include advisor-mcp, approval-mcp, and computer-use-mcp tools; added 10 MCP tool permission entries to .claude/settings.json

tasks.description: AUDIT-P0: Add SQLite WAL/SHM and global cache files to .gitignore (.ai/state.sqlite-shm, .ai/state.sqlite-wal). Prevents accidental commit of half-flushed WAL state.
tasks.summary: .gitignore extended: **/node_modules, .ai/state.sqlite-shm/wal, *.sqlite-shm/wal, testsprite_tests/.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P0: state-db.js singleton ignores aiDir on subsequent calls — silent bug if two consumers in same process pass different aiDir. Key cache by aiDir or assert mismatch.
tasks.summary: state-db.js getDb() now keys cached connections by resolved aiDir path (Map). Two consumers passing different aiDir get distinct DatabaseSync instances instead of silently sharing the first-opened one.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P0: Add committed .env.example documenting required env var names (empty values) so contributors discover the implicit dependency.
tasks.summary: Added .env.example with documented variable names (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, TESTSPRITE_API_KEY, CLAUDE_THINKING_BUDGET_TOKENS, GH_TOKEN) — all empty values, gitignored .env unaffected.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P1: advisor-mcp env-spread security regression — invokeGemini() spreads ...process.env, leaking host secrets to spawned gemini process. Replace with explicit allowlist (PATH, HOME, GEMINI_THINKING_EFFORT, GEMINI_API_KEY). Same class of bug previously fixed in computer-use-mcp.
tasks.summary: advisor-mcp invokeGemini() — replaced ...process.env spread with explicit allowlist (PATH, HOME, GEMINI_THINKING_EFFORT, optional GEMINI_API_KEY, optional GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS). Same pattern as computer-use-mcp D-002.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P1: Unify structured logging across all 21 MCP servers. Currently only 4/21 emit structured JSON (advisor, approval, cache-manager, computer-use). Extract shared src/shared/logger.js helper and migrate.
tasks.summary: Extracted src/mcp/shared/logger.js (createLogger(service) → debug/info/warn/error/log emitting NDJSON to stderr). Migrated all 21 MCP servers: 4 already-structured servers refactored to use shared module; 17 remaining servers gained the import + logger instance, with the 8 existing console.error/stderr.write call sites replaced by logger.warn/info calls. Approval-mcp HITL TTY prompts kept as raw stderr by design (user-facing, not log lines).

tasks.description: AUDIT-P1: computer-use-mcp accepts unbounded coordinates and unvalidated text length. Math.round(NaN)=NaN passed to xdotool fails opaquely; type_text has no length cap (ARG_MAX crash risk). Add inputSchema constraints (integer, min/max) + length cap on text/key.
tasks.summary: computer-use-mcp: inputSchema tightened (integer + min/max + additionalProperties:false on coords; maxLength 4096 on text, 64 on key). Added _validateCoord/_validateText/_validateKey runtime guards in dispatcher returning [VALIDATE_FAIL] on garbage args.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P1: Hoist @modelcontextprotocol/sdk version pin to root package.json — child workspaces all use ^1.0.0 caret, allowing minor drift between servers. Pin exact version at root, set children to "*".
tasks.summary: Pinned @modelcontextprotocol/sdk to exact 1.27.1 at root package.json. All 20 child workspaces switched from ^1.0.0 caret to "*" so they resolve through root hoisting. npm install confirms a single hoisted copy at node_modules/@modelcontextprotocol/sdk; nested copies in orchestrator-mcp/context-invoker-mcp gone.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P1: Untrack committed node_modules. src/mcp/context-invoker-mcp/node_modules/.package-lock.json is in git ls-files. Update .gitignore to **/node_modules and git rm -r --cached the dirs.
tasks.summary: git rm -r --cached src/mcp/context-invoker-mcp/node_modules; .gitignore now matches **/node_modules. node_modules no longer tracked.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P2: Wrap unguarded JSON.parse calls. state-db.js:98 (d.files), memory-manager-mcp:43 — corrupt SQLite payload would crash the server. Add safeJsonParse helper that returns null and logs structured warning.
tasks.summary: state-db.js JSON.parse(d.files) wrapped in _safeParseFiles() — returns [] on parse error and emits stderr warning instead of crashing readState().

tasks.description: AUDIT-P2: Extend safe-exec-mcp BLOCK_RULES with chmod 777 /, dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/sd*, mkfs.*, > /etc/passwd, find / -delete patterns. Currently only catches rm -rf, curl|bash, DROP TABLE, fork bomb.
tasks.summary: safe-exec-mcp BLOCK_RULES extended: DD_DISK_WIPE, MKFS, FIND_DELETE_ROOT, REDIRECT_TO_SYSTEM_FILE, CHMOD_ROOT.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P2: token-budget-mcp error messages reference better-sqlite3 but the import is node:sqlite (Node 22+ built-in). Replace "Install better-sqlite3" with "Requires Node.js 22+ with node:sqlite".
tasks.summary: token-budget-mcp: replaced "install better-sqlite3" / "install node:sqlite" with "Requires Node.js 22+ with node:sqlite". Header comment updated.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P2: cache-manager-mcp readSqliteSchema leaks file handle if prepare/all() throws — close() is inside try block, not finally. Wrap in try/finally with sdb?.close() to prevent SHM pinning.
tasks.summary: cache-manager-mcp readSqliteSchema() — moved sdb.close() into finally block (try { sdb?.close() } catch). Prevents SHM pinning on prepare/all() exceptions.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P2: Add additionalProperties:false to validate_payload tool inputSchema in task-synchronizer-mcp. Currently silently accepts unknown fields at the wrapper level.
tasks.summary: task-synchronizer-mcp validate_payload tool inputSchema: added additionalProperties:false. Unknown fields at wrapper level now rejected.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P2: Replace string-search tests (grep / String.includes against source) with stdio JSON-RPC roundtrip behavioral tests. Current tests broke on cosmetic single/double quote differences. Build a tests/lib/mcp-client.sh helper.
tasks.summary: Built tests/lib/mcp-client.sh — spawns MCP server, exchanges initialize/notifications-initialized/tools-list (or tools-call) frames over stdio, returns parsed JSON. Helper exposes mcp_list_tools / mcp_call_tool / mcp_assert_tool_listed. Added tests/suites/mcp_behavioral_test.sh as proof-of-pattern: 37 behavioral roundtrip assertions across 19 servers (computer-use-mcp skipped — needs Xvfb). Bulk migration of remaining ~131 grep-against-source assertions left as ongoing follow-up.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P3: tests/run.sh emits raw ESC[31m escape codes when piped (visible in CI logs). Detect TTY before applying colors or strip on non-TTY output.
tasks.summary: tests/run.sh + tests/lib/assert.sh: ANSI colors only emitted when [[ -t 1 ]] (interactive TTY). Empty strings on non-TTY keep CI logs clean.

tasks.description: AUDIT-P3: archive-manager-mcp hardcodes ~/.ai-os/bin/ai path. Add ENOENT fallback or accept ai-bin path arg for users with custom install prefixes.
tasks.summary: archive-manager-mcp execute_archive — locator chain extended: AI_OS_BIN env override, /usr/local/bin/ai, ~/.ai-os/bin/ai, /opt/homebrew/bin/ai, /opt/ai-os/bin/ai, repo src/bin/ai, then `command -v ai` PATH lookup as final fallback. Error message updated.

tasks.description: AUDIT-FOLLOWUP: Bulk-migrate the remaining ~128 grep-against-source assertions in tests/suites/*.sh to behavioral roundtrips via tests/lib/mcp-client.sh. E-27 delivered the helper + 37 example assertions; finish the conversion suite-by-suite so cosmetic source edits stop breaking the gate.

AUDIT-NEW: `ai sync` regenerates _SKILLS_INDEX.md non-deterministically (alphabetical re-sort + description rewording). Causes spurious diffs every sync. Either make the generator stable (sort once, freeze description text) or stop tracking the auto-generated index in git.

AUDIT-NEW: Commit (or formally exclude) the four shared skills appearing as untracked in .gemini/skills/ — ai-context-check, ai-debug, ai-handoff, ai-log. Source already lives in src/shared/skills/, so either backfill them into the .gemini/ tracked tree or update install-ai-os.sh to mark them as install-only artifacts.

AUDIT-NEW: Add a pre-commit hook (or CI step) that runs `bash tests/suites/registry_sync_test.sh` and `bash tests/run.sh` before allowing a commit so the registry-drift class of regression (root cause of the 2026-04-27 audit) cannot ship again.

stamps.summary: ARCH_AUDIT: High orphaned MCP risk and boilerplate in Sections 1-6; domain blueprints required.
Tier 2 review: fix CRITIC_STAMP persistence (SQLite-first hook check + MCP-only stamp instructions) — ARCH_PASS SEC_PASS TESTS_PASS
Full project audit: removed UPDATE.md/QUESTIONS.md ghosts, rewrote stale contracts, synced src↔installed, fixed RULES.md typo — ARCH_PASS SEC_PASS TESTS_PASS
ARCH_AUDIT: System is healthy, domain blueprints created, zero open tasks, token usage is 0, high MCP orchestration fragmentation risk noted.
Docs audit complete — 2 gaps found in README/CONTRIBUTING vs architect.md
Docs audit complete — 0 gaps found in README/CONTRIBUTING vs architect.md. E-4 and E-5 were successful.
E-8 computer-use-mcp — blueprint coverage confirmed, sovereignty boundaries respected, MCP pattern followed correctly
E-8 computer-use-mcp — no P0 vulns. P1 fixes applied: env spread removed from healthCheck(), shell binaries declared in CAPABILITIES.md. T-CU-001..005 mitigated in code
E-8 computer-use-mcp — 34/34 tests pass. All 7 tools, 5 security boundaries, error paths, registry/.mcp.json entries covered. Full suite 458/458
E-8 computer-use-mcp Tier 3 review complete — ARCH_PASS SEC_PASS TESTS_PASS. P1 fixes applied: env spread removed, CAPABILITIES.md updated, SECURITY.md stale labels resolved
E-10 approval-mcp — blueprint coverage confirmed per interop.md §2, MCP pattern followed, no sovereignty violations, single tool correctly scoped
E-10 approval-mcp — all T-HITL-001..005 mitigations verified in code: ANSI stripped, DB_PATH hardcoded, stdin.isTTY asserted, SQLite write before response, length limits enforced with rejection
E-10 approval-mcp — 37/37 tests pass. All 5 T-HITL mitigations, input validation, SQLite schema, registry/.mcp.json entries verified. Full suite 531/531.
E-10 approval-mcp Tier 3 review — ARCH_PASS SEC_PASS TESTS_PASS. All HITL mitigations enforced: ANSI sanitization, hardcoded SQLite path, TTY assertion, pre-response audit write, length rejection.
